'31^ ( i i * l HlW'O.f'RT, 1990%f¥W3 %, «JM f¥tH (2>"$ "©5" (^T) % TOI^ftHldfelcf <^U' 3RT:Wfaa F^t-MT [tf. 97/^,^.-1/20/^] Ttrr? fcuivft:— i p f=r*nr-RrTW 16 SFTOT, i 9 9 0 ^ 3 j f o ^ f r t f . ^."ifff.wrc. 708 (i) % a^pfe sraftitf fan^ $i 3186 OI/97 (1) -- 1 of 5 -- THE GAZETTE OF INDIA : EXTRAORDINARY [PART II—Se MINISTRY OF RAILWAYS • ffosUway Board) NOTIFICATION New Delhi, the 12th December, 1997 G.S.R. 704(E).—In exercise oRbe-povvers conferred by clause (c) of sub-section (2) of the section 60 of the Railway Act. 1989 (24 of 1989), the Central Government hereby makes the following rules, namely :— 1. (i) These rules may be called the Passengers (Change of Names) Amendment Rules, 1997. (ii) The shall come into force on the date of their publication In Affiqial G%zette._^ 2. In rule 3 of the Passengers (Change of Names) Rules, 1990, in sub-rtile (2), after clause (d), the following clause shall be inserted, namely :— "(e) Where the passengers are a group of Cadets of National Cadet Corps and any officer whs is the Head of the group makes a request in writing at least twenty four hours before the scheduled departure of the train that the reservation made in the name of any cadet be transferred to any other cadet; Provided that any such request for change shall be granted only jince; Provided further that in no case such request for change in excess of ten per cent of the total strength of the group shall be granted". [No. 97/TG.I/20/P] D. P. TRIPATHI, Secy. Foot Note.—The Principal rules were published in the Gazette of India vide Notification No. G.S.R. 708 (E) dated the 16th August. 1990. R »TW?; ftirf (ff. 89/*t*ft 1/20M] MINISTRY OF 3RAILWAY (Railway Board) NOTIFICATION New Delhi, the 16th August, 1990 O.J-.R. 708x.S).—In exercise of the powers confer- red bf Clause (c) of subsection (2) of Section 60 of i&e .Railways Act, 1989 {24 of 1989) read with sec- tiou "i2 o£ the gpcerai clauses Act 1897 (10 of 1897), ths. -Ifeatral CJovernment hereby makes th» following naks aamely; i -Short title and commeacement:—(i) Thess rules may bs called Passengers (Chaage of Names) Rules 1990. $> They shsii come iato foice on the date »! j'ss commenceaient of the Act; 2: DefSnition1? :—In these rules unless the context otherwise requires :—- (a) 'Act' means the Railways Act 1989 =24 of 1989;; (bj 'appropriate authority' means an authority approving the official tours of the Govern- ment servant concerned; t (c) 'Government servant' means any person serving uuder the Central or State Govern- ment; (d) 'member of the family' means father, mother, brother, sister, son, daughter, husband or •• wife; (e< 'passeugpr1 means a person travelling on a ticket or on a valid pass; (f) 'reserved ticket* means a journey ticket on wli'cii a berth or seat has been reserved; (g) Words and expressions vised herein and not defined but defined in the Act shall have the meanings respectively assigned to them in the Act; 3. (1) Save as otherwise provided in sub-rule (2) a berth or a seat reserved in the name of a person shall be used only by that person and shall not be transferable to any oilier person. (2,1 Any railway servant authorised in this behalf by a railway administration may permit die chaage of name cf a passenger having a seat or berth reserved in his name in the following circumstances, namely :— (a) Where the passenger is a Government servant proceeding on duty and appropriate autho- rity makes a request in writing 24 hours befoce the scheduled departure of, the trait. that (he reservation made in the name of the Government servant be transferred to another Government servant proceeding oa duty; (b) Where the passenger makes a request in •writing 24 hours before, the scheduled de- parture of lie train that the reservation made in his name be transferred to another member of his family; (c) Where the passengers are students of a &• cognised educational institution and the Head of the institution makes a request to writing ^8 hours before the scheduled de- parture of the train, that the reservat'ofl made in the name of any student be ti»»s- ?etred to any other student of the same institut;on; Provided that any such request for change shall be granted only once: Provided further that in no case such request for change in excess of ten per cent of the total str?r";fi' of the group shall be granted: -- 4 of 5 -- mm " (i) Wfaes© the passrogess as© members-.of a maraage party and any peicsoa deemed to b® the Efead of SUCSJ party, askeg a Request in writing 48 hours before the scheduled departure of tire taria that the. reservatioE made In the nam® of aay member of the marriage party be isaasfemd to aay othes psrsps; ^ 3 Provided that any m& mqmst tot change afeafl be graated oofy ©nee; Prodded iutQaef. that la ao ease sucli re- quest lot damage ia assess of tea pet cent of &e total stresgfk of (be group shall fee graated.
